policy.artifact_rule: Every automated lane writes one run manifest. Individual generated files remain in their canonical locations and are referenced with sha256, size, and producer command.
policy.wrapper_rule: Legacy shell entrypoints may exist only as compatibility wrappers around the canonical driver.
policy.stable_checkpoint_rule: A run manifest is stable-checkpoint eligible only when release blockers in docs/release/RELEASE_READINESS.md are closed or explicitly scoped, and every device-gated artifact named by docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md is passing with the required proof. Host-only planned-gap verifiers, non-passing artifacts, device-gated lanes without promotion artifacts, missing required device artifacts, and planned-gap artifacts with success=false are non-promoting evidence.
policy.artifact_absence_rule: If a device-gated lane or CI gate ledger row names a required artifact and the run/checkpoint bundle does not contain a fresh artifact produced by the named device command on the required installed APK/device, classify the gate as missing-artifact or planned-gap evidence. Absence of a real device artifact is never a pass, even when a host verifier exits zero after validating the planned-gap contract.
policy.device_gate_rule: Lanes that require adb/installed APKs provide device evidence only; they do not promote a stable checkpoint unless the corresponding CI gate ledger promotion condition is satisfied, the artifact status is passing, and success/stable_checkpoint_eligible are true.
policy.granularity_rule: Broad P0/P1 blockers are split into execution_units. A passing sub-unit is regression evidence only and cannot promote a stable checkpoint unless the lane promotion_condition and matching device artifact promotion condition also pass.

host-smoke.description: Fast host-only regression checks that should pass during normal development.

commands.shell: tmp=$(mktemp); python3 scripts/verify-storage-metrics.py --print-sequence-fixture > "$tmp"; python3 scripts/verify-storage-metrics.py --sequence "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"

planned_gap_contracts: service-truth
runtime-teardown
image-pull-crash-safety
llama GPU Q6_K correctness/workgroup/writeback device evidence
terminal exec-it raw Engine JSONL device evidence
APK memory pager and OOM/LMK device replay
storage graph/layer maintenance device evidence
linkat hardlink semantics device evidence
Docker CLI docker cp end-to-end device evidence
COW/overlay external kill-at-step device evidence
image live-pull interruption device replay
archive API device mutation promotion
default dev-workspace compose health device evidence
SAF direct-output Documents device evidence
storage metrics baseline/build/rebuild/edit/prune device sequence evidence
single-container docker run echo-hi device evidence
modern/no-PRoot runtime truth device evidence

android-llama-gpu-q6k.description: Device route for llama GPU Q6_K workgroup/writeback correctness evidence. Local checks and blocked-memory/readiness artifacts are non-promoting; no benchmark or inference claim is allowed until the verifier reports a Q6_K oracle match on device.
planned_gap_contracts: llama GPU Q6_K correctness/workgroup/writeback device evidence
android-llama-gpu-q6k.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md llama GPU correctness promotion condition with status=pass, benchmark_claim_allowed=true, Q6_K local-size/writeback diagnostics present, and a matching Q6_K oracle; blocked-memory, readiness-blocked, or oracle-mismatch artifacts remain non-promoting.

execution_units.scope: Compare script, pdockerd defaults, UI/compose launch path, and artifact verifier use the audited GPU diagnostic environment.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Environment parity plus connected-device readiness/headroom pass; mismatches or readiness-blocked artifacts are non-promoting.

execution_units.scope: ADB/device, installed APK, model fixture, thermal/device metadata, and Android swap/headroom are checked before model load.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Readiness status is pass and does not use --allow-memory-blocker as release evidence.

execution_units.scope: Forced NGL=1 Q6_K workgroup/writeback device run captures local-size, writable-output, and sampled oracle data.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Verifier reports a matching Q6_K oracle; numeric mismatches remain blocker evidence only.

execution_units.scope: NGL>=2 repeating-layer proof and CPU/GPU throughput fields are considered only after correctness passes.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: benchmark_claim_allowed=true and the CI gate ledger llama GPU promotion condition passes.

python-coverage.promotion_condition: Non-promoting coverage evidence only. Stable/release checkpoint credit still requires closed or explicitly scoped release blockers plus passing device-gated artifacts that satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion conditions.

test-suite-local.description: Local dry-run of the bundled compose/Dockerfile test-suite scripts.
test-suite-local.promotion_condition: Non-promoting local dry-run evidence only. Stable/release checkpoint credit requires the corresponding device test-suite lane and all required CI gate ledger promotion artifacts to pass.

storage-layer-maintenance-ui.description: Host-only, non-promoting storage graph/layer maintenance UI contract. It keeps cache references distinct from image references, requires size and reference-tree actions, and records stale/garbage cleanup evidence without claiming device promotion.
planned_gap_contracts: storage graph/layer maintenance device evidence for cache-vs-image refs, sizes, tree actions, and stale/garbage cleanup
storage-layer-maintenance-ui.promotion_condition: Non-promoting manifest gate only. Stable/release credit still requires a device artifact proving the UI flow, Engine storage state, storage graph rendering, and cleanup evidence agree after build, prune, rebuild, image delete, and stale-cache cleanup.

cow-overlay-bench-recovery.description: Local COW overlay benchmark and recovery scaffold for libcow fallback.
planned_gap_contracts: COW/overlay external kill-at-step device evidence

android-cow-overlay-kill-at-step.description: Device route for COW/overlay external daemon/helper kill-at-step recovery evidence. Without adb or the APK checkpoint helper it writes non-promoting planned-gap/blocked-device evidence only.
android-cow-overlay-kill-at-step.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md COW/overlay external kill-at-step promotion condition with status=pass and every required case proven by adb/run-as evidence.

android-terminal-exec-it.description: Device route for UI-driven Engine exec -it terminal proof. Host artifact verification is non-promoting unless paired with raw Engine exec JSONL from a real container session.
android-terminal-exec-it.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md terminal exec-it promotion condition with a passing UI self-test artifact and engine-exec-input JSONL verified using --require-container.

execution_units.scope: Container terminals use Engine exec/HTTP upgrade while local PTY, daemon log, and job log sessions stay separate.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Paired raw Engine JSONL proves the route for a real running container.

execution_units.scope: Raw JSONL proves single Enter, isolated Ctrl-C/ETX without literal c injection, ArrowUp history, top repaint, q return, and resize.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: verify-terminal-exec-it-artifact passes with --require-container on fresh paired artifacts.

execution_units.scope: UI self-test covers JP/EN IME and shell usability after q/resize regression cases.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Host verifier alone is non-promoting; both device artifacts must be present and current.

android-image-live-pull-interruption.description: Planned device route for timed live registry pull interruption. It must use a scenario-owned or isolated fixture and currently writes non-promoting planned-gap evidence only.
planned_gap_contracts: timed live registry pull interruption without user tag overwrite
android-image-live-pull-interruption.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md image pull crash-safety promotion condition with status=pass, live_interrupted_network_pull=true, and proof that only scenario-owned tags/layers were touched.

android-test-suite.description: Device route: stage compose project, compose up/build through the app, then Engine exec the test-suite.
android-test-suite.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with a passing device artifact before release/stable credit.

android-documents.description: Device route: container /documents writes must prove direct SAF/Documents backend output, sidecar metadata, and explicit fallback evidence.
android-documents.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with a passing device artifact before release/stable credit.

commands.shell:
rm -f docs/test/saf-direct-output-latest.json
CID="${PDOCKER_SAF_DIRECT_OUTPUT_CONTAINER:-}"
if [ -z "$CID" ] && [ -f docs/test/dev-workspace-compose-latest.json ]; then
  python3 scripts/verify-dev-workspace-compose-artifact.py docs/test/dev-workspace-compose-latest.json
  CID="$(python3 - <<'PYDOCS'
import json
try:
    data=json.load(open('docs/test/dev-workspace-compose-latest.json'))
    print(data.get('checks',{}).get('engine_state',{}).get('running_container_id',''))
except Exception:
    print('')
PYDOCS
)"
fi
if [ -z "$CID" ]; then
  echo "android-documents requires PDOCKER_SAF_DIRECT_OUTPUT_CONTAINER or a passing dev-workspace artifact" >&2
  exit 2
fi
PDOCKER_SAF_DIRECT_OUTPUT_CONTAINER="$CID" bash scripts/android-documents-mediator-smoke.sh
python3 scripts/verify-saf-direct-output-artifact.py docs/test/saf-direct-output-latest.json

planned_gap_contracts: SAF direct-output Documents device evidence with real container id

android-dev-workspace.description: Device route: UI-triggered default dev-workspace compose up with build/run, current pdocker-dev Engine state, port 18080 listener, code-server HTTP, configured extension, and UI service-truth evidence.
android-dev-workspace.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with a passing device artifact before release/stable credit.

android-blas-cmake-build.description: Device build route for apt-installed OpenBLAS visibility across Dockerfile RUN layers and standard CMake FindBLAS.
android-blas-cmake-build.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with a passing device artifact before release/stable credit.

android-file-io-microbench.description: Device benchmark route for native/container file-I/O overhead, including Documents/SD mirror paths when configured.
android-file-io-microbench.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with a passing device artifact before release/stable credit.

android-memory-pager.description: Device route for APK-scoped memory pager probes and bounded OOM/LMK telemetry artifacts. Planned-gap, blocked-device, and host-only artifacts are non-promoting until connected-device pager plus LMK replay evidence passes.
android-memory-pager.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the matching docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md promotion condition with passing managed/transparent pager artifacts plus controlled OOM/LMK replay before release/stable credit.
planned_gap_contracts: APK memory pager promotion device evidence and controlled OOM/LMK replay

execution_units.scope: Explicit managed opt-in proves managed-region table counters, page materialization, dirty/writeback accounting, and safe denial/fallback fields.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Connected-device managed artifact passes and is paired with OOM/LMK replay; standalone PoC artifacts are non-promoting.

execution_units.scope: Transparent probe proves capability detection, unsupported mapping exclusion/pass-through, and unresolved-fault fail-closed diagnostics.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Connected-device transparent artifact passes and does not claim ordinary Dockerfile heap paging.

execution_units.scope: Controlled replay proves allocation denial, backend-death classifier, ring/summary retention, and operation/container identity.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Full pager plus LMK replay promotion condition passes with UI stale-evidence rejection.

linkat-hardlink-semantics-plan.description: Host/static verifier for the planned Android linkat hardlink semantics gate. It keeps the current copy fallback fail-closed and non-promoting until device evidence proves inode identity, link counts, write-through, errno parity, and restart recovery.
planned_gap_contracts: linkat hardlink semantics device evidence
linkat-hardlink-semantics-plan.promotion_condition: Must satisfy the planned Android direct-syscall linkat gate with identical st_dev/st_ino, st_nlink growth/decrement, write-through behavior, Linux errno parity, and restart recovery; the file-copy fallback cannot promote.

execution_units.scope: C runtime contract for linkat AT_FDCWD/path variants, invalid flags, missing parents, cross-root escapes, and directory hardlink denial.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Host/static contract is represented; Android device semantics artifact is still required.

execution_units.scope: Metadata/index or CoW peer tracking records hardlink relationships without treating copy-fallback bytes as success.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Design/static evidence cannot promote until direct-runtime C implementation and device proof pass.

execution_units.scope: C implementation proves creation, unlink decrement, rename/replace over hardlinked destinations, copy-up interactions, and write-through from either name.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Device artifact must prove identical st_dev/st_ino, link-count transitions, write-through, and Linux errno parity.

execution_units.scope: Daemon/helper kill during metadata updates recovers without partial hardlink index or divergent copy fallback promotion.
execution_units.non_promoting_until: Final Android restart-recovery artifact passes; planned-gap or host-only artifacts remain non-promoting.

android-docker-cp-e2e.description: Planned device route for Docker CLI docker cp end-to-end proof against the same current Engine container. Host archive API compatibility is non-promoting until this gate proves copy and metadata behavior on device.
planned_gap_contracts: Docker CLI docker cp end-to-end device evidence
android-docker-cp-e2e.promotion_condition: Must produce a passing docker-cp-e2e device artifact with same Engine container ID, host-to-container and container-to-host copy, archive HEAD/GET/PUT, X-Docker-Container-Path-Stat, byte/sha256 equality, hardlink/symlink and metadata policy, xattr, whiteout rejection, and escape-negative cases.

governance.description: Strict test-design gate. This lane is expected to fail until native/Kotlin coverage evidence and enough check items exist.
planned_gap_contracts: native/Kotlin coverage and check-density closure

release-honesty.description: Host-only release-blocker honesty check. Passing means publication hygiene and metadata wording are sane; it does not promote a stable checkpoint while P0 device gates remain open.
release-honesty.promotion_condition: All P0 rows in docs/release/RELEASE_READINESS.md must be closed or explicitly scoped, and device-gated artifacts in docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md must satisfy their promotion conditions.

android-storage-metrics-sequence.description: Device route for baseline/build/rebuild/edit/prune storage metrics sequence evidence. The runner removes stale artifacts and writes a non-promoting planned-gap artifact until a full fresh sequence validates.
planned_gap_contracts: storage metrics baseline/build/rebuild/edit/prune device sequence evidence
android-storage-metrics-sequence.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md storage metrics sequence promotion condition with a passing docs/test/storage-metrics-sequence-latest.json captured from the connected device.

android-runtime-teardown.description: Device route for runtime teardown evidence. The current smoke intentionally returns planned-gap/non-promoting evidence until a device-pass reducer exists.
planned_gap_contracts: runtime teardown device-pass reducer for process/listener/stale/executor cleanup
android-runtime-teardown.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md runtime teardown promotion condition with Status=device-pass, Success=true, and strict same-container-ID proof artifacts.

commands.shell:
rm -f docs/test/runtime-teardown-latest.json
rm -rf docs/test/runtime-teardown
set +e
SKYDNIR_SMOKE_ARTIFACT_DIR=docs/test bash scripts/android-device-smoke.sh --no-install --runtime-teardown default-workspace
rc=$?
set -e
case "$rc" in
  0)
    python3 scripts/verify-runtime-teardown-artifact.py --expect-device-pass --evidence-root docs/test/runtime-teardown docs/test/runtime-teardown-latest.json
    ;;
  2)
    python3 scripts/verify-runtime-teardown-artifact.py --expect-planned-gap docs/test/runtime-teardown-latest.json
    ;;
  *)
    exit "$rc"
    ;;
esac

android-service-truth.description: Device route for service truth evidence. The current smoke intentionally returns planned-gap/non-promoting evidence until UI card, Engine state, listener owner, process tree, and logs reduce to the same container ID.
planned_gap_contracts: service truth device-pass reducer for UI/Engine/state/process/listener/log same-ID proof
android-service-truth.promotion_condition: Must satisfy docs/test/CI_GATE_LEDGER.md service truth promotion condition with Status=device-pass, Success=true, and strict same-container-ID proof artifacts.

commands.shell:
rm -f docs/test/service-truth-latest.json
set +e
SKYDNIR_SMOKE_ARTIFACT_DIR=docs/test bash scripts/android-device-smoke.sh --no-install --service-truth default-workspace
rc=$?
set -e
test "$rc" -eq 2
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('docs/test/service-truth-latest.json')
if not p.is_file():
    raise SystemExit('service truth artifact missing')
data=json.loads(p.read_text())
if data.get('Status') != 'planned-gap' or data.get('Success') is not False:
    raise SystemExit('service truth scaffold must remain planned-gap Success=false')
PY

android-single-container-echo-hi.description: Focused Android device gate for docker run --rm ubuntu:22.04 echo hi. It must not rely on --quick, because quick exits before docker_run_rm_smoke.
planned_gap_contracts: single-container docker run echo-hi device evidence
android-single-container-echo-hi.promotion_condition: Must produce runtime-single-container-echo-hi-latest.json proving stdout exactly hi, exit code 0, real Engine container ID, and no host-shell fallback.

android-modern-runtime-truth.description: Modern/no-PRoot runtime truth gate. Until real no-PRoot process execution exists, this lane records explicit non-promoting capability failure evidence.
planned_gap_contracts: modern/no-PRoot runtime truth device evidence
android-modern-runtime-truth.promotion_condition: Must either prove real no-PRoot process execution or a fail-closed UI/API contract with no RUN/docker run/Compose/service success claims.

commands.shell:
mkdir -p docs/test
cat > docs/test/no-proot-runtime-truth-latest.json <<'JSON'
{
  "schema": "pdocker.android.no-proot-runtime-truth.v1",
  "status": "planned-gap",
  "success": false,
  "reason": "modern/no-PRoot execution must be proven on device or fail closed before promotion",
  "promotion": "non-promoting scaffold"
}
JSON
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('docs/test/no-proot-runtime-truth-latest.json')
data=json.loads(p.read_text())
if data.get('status') != 'planned-gap' or data.get('success') is not False:
    raise SystemExit('no-PRoot runtime truth scaffold must remain non-promoting')
PY
